scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p src/idl src/types && { [ -f ../../target/idl/fogo_onre_relayer.json ] && cp ../../target/idl/fogo_onre_relayer.json src/idl/fogo_onre_relayer.json || echo 'skip idl copy: anchor target not built (using checked-in copy)'; } && { [ -f ../../target/types/fogo_onre_relayer.ts ] && cp ../../target/types/fogo_onre_relayer.ts src/types/fogo_onre_relayer.ts || echo 'skip types copy: anchor target not built (using checked-in copy)'; }
